messages.content: 改写以下英语：Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs owing to their exceptional chemical stability, biocompatibility, mechanical flexibility, and strong tribo-negative properties associated with the presence of fluorine groups.
PVDF及其共聚物，例如聚（偏氟乙烯）- 共- 六氟丙烯（PVDF-HFP），因其卓越的化学稳定性、生物适合性、机械柔韧性以及与氟基存在相关的强烈三负电摩擦性能而成为耐穿戴摩擦发电器的有前途的候选材料。

改写以下句子：Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs owing to their exceptional chemical stability, biocompatibility, mechanical flexibility, and strong tribo-negative properties associated with the presence of fluorine groups.
PVDF及其共聚物（如聚（偏氟乙烯）-共-六氟丙烯（PVDF-HFP））因其卓越的化学稳定性、生物适合性、机械柔韧性以及与氟基的存在相关的强烈三负电摩擦性能而成为有前途的可穿戴TENG电源的有希望的候选材料。

改写以下英语语法：Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs owing to their exceptional chemical stability, biocompatibility, mechanical flexibility, and strong tribo-negative properties associated with the presence of fluorine groups.

Due to their exceptional chemical stability, biocompatibility, mechanical flexibility, and strong tribo-negative properties associated with the presence of fluorine groups, polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have become promising candidates for wearable TENGs.

改写以下英语句式：Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs owing to their exceptional chemical stability, biocompatibility, mechanical flexibility, and strong tribo-negative properties associated with the presence of fluorine groups.

The exceptional chemical stability, biocompatibility, mechanical flexibility, and strong tribo-negative properties associated with the presence of fluorine groups have led polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), to emerge as promising candidates for wearable TENGs.

改写以下英语句式：The exceptional mechanical flexibility, chemical stability, biocompatibility, and strong electronegative properties originated from fluorine groups have made polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), to emerge as promising candidates for wearable TENGs.

Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs owing to their exceptional mechanical flexibility, chemical stability, biocompatibility, and strong electronegative properties originating from fluorine groups.

改写以下英语：The exceptional mechanical flexibility, chemical stability, biocompatibility, and strong electronegative properties originated from fluorine groups have made polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers to emerge as promising candidates for wearable TENGs.

Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs due to their exceptional mechanical flexibility, chemical stability, biocompatibility, and strong electronegative properties that originate from fluorine groups.

改写以下句式：Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs due to their exceptional mechanical flexibility, chemical stability, biocompatibility, and strong electronegative properties that originate from fluorine groups.

The exceptional mechanical flexibility, chemical stability, biocompatibility, and strong electronegative properties originating from fluorine groups have led polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers to emerge as promising candidates for wearable TENGs.
改写Electrospinning allows for easy processing of PVDF-HFP into flexible fiber mats with excellent surface roughness and porosity, thereby offering superior wearability and breathability.
Through electrospinning, PVDF-HFP can be processed into flexible fiber mats that possess superior wearability and breathability due to their excellent surface roughness and porosity.

改写Furthermore, the uniaxial stretching of the polymer chains during electrospinning promotes the formation of strongly oriented β-phase PVDF-HFP that has the largest spontaneous polarization, thereby enhancing surface charge density.

Moreover, electrospinning involves the uniaxial stretching of polymer chains, which encourages the formation of the β-phase PVDF-HFP with the highest spontaneous polarization and enhances surface charge density.
改写Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers, such as poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene (PVDF-HFP), have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs
Promising candidates for wearable TENGs include PVDF (polyvinylidene fluoride) and its copolymers, such as PVDF-HFP (poly(vinylidene fluoride)-co-hexafluoropropylene).
Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) and its copolymers have emerged as promising candidates for wearable TENGs
Promising candidates for wearable TENGs are PVDF (polyvinylidene fluoride) and its copolymers.
改写
PVDF (polyvinylidene fluoride) and its copolymers are being regarded as promising candidates for wearable TENGs.

改写To increase the content of β-phase and achieve a conjugation effect between doped molecules and PVDF-HFP chains in nanofibers, traditional filler strategies such as doping with metal nanoparticles, functionalized multiwalled carbon nanotubes, graphene, and semiconducting perovskite have been developed.

Conventional filler techniques, including doping with metal nanoparticles, functionalized multiwalled carbon nanotubes, graphene, and semiconducting perovskite, have been developed to increase the content of β-phase and establish a conjugation effect between the doped molecules and PVDF-HFP chains in nanofibers.

改写nanofillers often cause a mixed anisotropic crystalline structure containing α-, β-, and γ-phases along the uniaxial orientation of nanofibers, which may cause charge annihilation at different crystal interfaces and hinders TENG performance improvement.

The use of nanofillers often results in a mixed anisotropic crystalline structure that contains α-, β-, and γ-phases along the uniaxial orientation of nanofibers. This can cause charge annihilation at different crystal interfaces and limit the improvement of TENG performance.
改写Therefore, it remains challenging yet equally crucial to increase β-phase content and precisely control the arrangement of β-phase along the uniaxial orientation.
As a result, increasing the content of β-phase and accurately controlling its arrangement along the uniaxial orientation remains a significant challenge that is equally critical to overcome.
改写These factors promote overflow and transmission of charges among the continuous β-phase domains, which ultimately improves electric conversion efficiency.
The aforementioned factors facilitate the overflow and transfer of charges among the continuous domains of β-phase, resulting in an overall improvement in electric conversion efficiency.
